info: Hello! I'm Debbie Biteye. I attended the Old Dominion Universityand majored in Information Systems and Technology. I previously worked as a Journalist in different parts of Africa. I live in Johns Creek,Georgia with my husband and two girls,Nachella and Zara. I have a strange affinity for all things medical, except the bloody part. My interests include reading everything and anything.Proponent of the underdog.Shy and reserved disposition.
Hello! I'm Feefee. I attended the Dolvin.
